artists.name: Ink & Watercolour
artists.summary: Loose ink linework over watercolor on cream paper, ragged unframed plate edges — the house style.
artists.goodFor: Literary fiction, horror, adventure — the all-purpose house style
artists.style: Loose impressionistic hand-drawn illustration: confident visible ink linework over watercolor wash on cream paper, granular paper texture, soft ragged blotchy edges fading directly into the bare cream-paper margin so the picture sits loose on the page like an unframed illustration plate. NO hard rectangular border, no black frame, no smooth rectangular vignette or inner box — bare white paper shows at the irregular edges. Full tonal range with rich near-black darks and real contrast, never flat or washed-out.

artists.name: Victorian Wood Engraving
artists.summary: Victorian newspaper wood engraving on coarse newsprint — sepia only, crosshatch, halftone grain.
artists.style: Victorian newspaper wood engraving reproduced on coarse newsprint: fine parallel-line crosshatch and stippling for all shading, sepia ink only, visible coarse newsprint halftone dot texture throughout the image, slight ink spread and fray at line edges, yellowed stock.

artists.name: Copperplate Etching
artists.summary: Copper-plate drypoint etching — burr-edged lines, residual plate tone, velvet darks.
artists.goodFor: Mystery, literary fiction, dark atmosphere, elegant horror
artists.style: Copper-plate drypoint etching: fine burr-edged lines with slight ink fray throughout, plate wiped but retaining a thin residual grey tone even in light areas — no true white, open areas carry a faint plate smear. Rich velvet darks where ink pools in the burr. Delicate, precise, slightly furred quality throughout. Printed in a single warm brownish-black (sepia-black) ink on aged cream laid paper — the same ink and paper tone consistently, no colour beyond the ink, never a cool neutral grey-black.

artists.name: Naturalist Field Sketch
artists.summary: Naturalist field sketch on ruled laid paper — pencil under dilute wash, hurried and observed.
artists.style: Victorian naturalist field sketch on cream laid paper: light graphite pencil underdrawing with thin dilute watercolor wash over it, faint ruled or grid lines showing through the wash from the sketchbook paper, abbreviated and economical marks as if drawn quickly on location. Slightly hurried, observed quality.

artists.name: Magic Lantern Slide
artists.summary: Glass-painted magic lantern illustration — warm amber centre, cool blue-grey margins.
artists.goodFor: Ghost stories, dream sequences, Victorian mystery, fairy tale
artists.style: Hand-painted illustration on glass for a Victorian magic lantern: warm amber and rose light glowing from the image's own centre, hand-applied translucent colour over a monochrome base, the warmth falling off to cool blue-grey at the margins as if the lamp's beam fades at the slide's edge.

artists.name: Mid-Century Gouache
artists.summary: Matte casein on toned board — powdery, formal, 1940s–60s scientific illustration.
artists.goodFor: Science fiction, clinical, institutional, cold-war thriller
artists.style: Casein or gouache on toned grey-beige board: matte chalky paint surface, flat even light, the warm grey ground showing through wherever paint is thin. Slightly powdery and deliberate — the clean formal manner of 1940s–60s scientific or educational illustration.

artists.name: Impasto Oil
artists.summary: Alla prima oil study — thick impasto, wet-on-wet edges, energetic unpolished marks.
artists.goodFor: Outdoor scenes, impressionist, vivid naturalistic settings
artists.style: Alla prima oil paint study: thick gestural impasto, visible palette-knife and bristle-brush marks, colours mixing wet-on-wet at edges and not fully resolved. Raised paint ridges catch light at every boundary. Energetic, unpolished, painted quickly on a primed white ground.

artists.name: Children's Picture Book
artists.summary: Watercolor over waxy colored-pencil underdrawing — 1950s children's book illustration.
artists.goodFor: Whimsical, fairy tale, children's adventure, cosy fantasy
artists.style: Soft watercolor washes with a waxy colored-pencil underdrawing visible through them: pencil lines peek through the wash in mid-tones, slightly waxy and resistant to the water. Slightly irregular, hand-illustrated character as in a 1950s–60s illustrated children's book. Soft warm paper grain.

artists.name: Comic Book
artists.summary: Hand-inked comic panel — flat solid colour, bold outlines, halftone shadows, no rendered look.
artists.goodFor: Noir, action, horror, graphic novel, high-contrast drama
artists.style: Hand-inked comic-book panel: crisp black ink outlines of even weight around every form, filled with FLAT areas of solid colour — no gradients, no soft shading, no blending, no painterly brushwork, no 3D rendered look. Shadows are hard-edged flat shapes one shade darker, with Ben-Day / halftone dot texture in the shadow areas only. Bold, graphic, limited mood-driven palette, printed flat like a vintage comic page. No speech bubbles, no panel borders, no captions.

artists.name: Pulp Magazine
artists.summary: 1930s pulp magazine linotype — black plus one warm press colour, halftone dot shadows.
artists.goodFor: Pulp adventure, noir, hard-boiled mystery, 1930s–40s period
artists.style: 1930s–40s pulp magazine interior illustration, linotype woodcut reproduction: bold black ink plus a single warm brick-red press colour throughout, halftone dot pattern in all shadow areas, slight ink bleed at block edges — the coarse result of fast commercial printing on cheap stock.

artists.name: Mimeograph Zine
artists.summary: Spirit duplicator on onionskin — purple-black ink, horizontal smear banding, crude coverage.
artists.goodFor: Punk, absurdist, counterculture, surreal, zine aesthetic
artists.style: Spirit duplicator print on thin onionskin stock: purple-black ink with faint horizontal smear banding running across the image from the drum, uneven ink coverage, deliberately crude marks — the faded lo-fi quality of a 1970s underground zine or school handout.

artists.name: Risograph Print
artists.summary: Risograph print — misregistered colour layers, halftone grain, limited flat palette.
artists.goodFor: Contemporary indie, wry comedy, lo-fi, modern horror
artists.style: Risograph print: exactly two ink-colour layers — fluorescent pink and federal blue — with deliberate misregistration so the two layers visibly offset and do not align, their overlap reading as a muddy purple. Visible halftone grain at layer edges, slightly overinked where layers overlap.

artists.name: Sumi-e Ink Rubbing
artists.summary: Ink rubbing through rice paper over carved block — velvet darks, torn washi edges.
artists.style: Ink rubbed through rice paper over a carved block: velvet-rich near-black ink heavier where the block surface is raised, thin and pale at the hollows. Torn washi paper edges with visible fibres. Minimal marks, large areas of bare fibrous paper — traditional Japanese rubbing quality.

artists.name: Pastel on Black
artists.summary: Pastel chalk on dark toned paper — light built from darkness, paper ground is the shadow.
artists.goodFor: Night scenes, interior gloom, dream, noir, horror
artists.style: Soft pastel chalk on deep charcoal-black toned paper: chalk strokes build light from darkness — the paper ground is the shadow everywhere the chalk does not reach. Blended, slightly smudged chalk marks, no outlines, light sculpted from dark.

artists.name: Hand-Coloured Lithograph
artists.summary: 1880s hand-coloured lithograph — ochre/sepia/cobalt palette, stone grain, slight misregistration.
artists.goodFor: Victorian travel, colonial adventure, exotic settings
artists.style: Hand-coloured stone lithograph in the style of an 1880s travel book illustration: formal composition, limited warm palette (ochre, sepia, raw sienna) with cobalt blue as the only cool note, visible stone-lithograph grain throughout, slight misregistration of the colour pass over the keystone.

artists.name: Cinematic Film Still
artists.summary: Cinematic film frame — anamorphic widescreen feel, dramatic key light, shallow focus, fine grain, graded colour.
artists.goodFor: Cinematic drama, thriller, horror, prestige-film mood
artists.style: A frame from a prestige feature film: photographic realism with a cinematic anamorphic look, a dramatic directional key light with deep shadow falloff, shallow depth of field so the background sits softly out of focus, fine 35mm film grain, and a deliberate cinematic colour grade. Lifelike textures and natural lens character — clearly photographed, not drawn or painted.

artists.name: Natural-Light Photo
artists.summary: Clean editorial interior photography — natural daylight, even exposure, true colour, sharp throughout.
artists.goodFor: Realism, contemporary, clean and legible settings
artists.style: Editorial architectural interior photography lit only by available light: soft natural daylight, even balanced exposure with open shadows, true-to-life colour, sharp focus throughout (deep depth of field), neutral white balance. Calm, clean, documentary realism — the room photographed plainly and legibly, with no dramatic grading or heavy crushed shadow.

artists.name: Antique Photograph
artists.summary: Large-format view-camera photograph — silver-gelatin black-and-white or faded sepia, period grain.
artists.style: A large-format view-camera photograph in the manner of an early albumen print: monochrome in a faded warm sepia tone consistently (never neutral black-and-white, never cool-toned) — with fine large-format sharpness, a long tonal range, slight vignetting, visible period photographic grain, and a touch of age-fade and emulsion mottling at the edges. Photographic realism, never engraved, crosshatched or drawn.

artists.name: 3D Render
artists.summary: Modern 3D CG render — global illumination, soft ambient occlusion, clean PBR materials, telltale rendered perfection.
artists.goodFor: Science fiction, stylised realism, clean modern look, games-adjacent
artists.style: A modern 3D computer-graphics render: physically based materials, soft global illumination with gentle ambient-occlusion contact shadows, clean reflections and subtle subsurface light, a shallow rendered depth of field. Slightly idealised, immaculate surfaces with the characteristic flawless smoothness of a high-end offline render — clearly CG, neither photographed nor hand-painted.

artists.name: OLD — Gouache Backdrops
artists.summary: 90s LucasArts/Sierra painted backgrounds — muted, recessive, fills the frame.
artists.style: Hand-painted gouache background art in the style of early-1990s LucasArts and Sierra point-and-click adventure games. Full but muted, desaturated palette; soft even ambient light with a single warm lantern glow as a quiet accent; low contrast, no harsh focal point, a calm backdrop that does not draw the eye, meant as accompaniment to story text. Painterly, slightly soft, no people, no text or UI overlays. Portrait, taller than wide, 3:4.

artists.name: OLD — Indexed Pixel
artists.summary: Low-res VGA pixel intent — but the model renders soft illustration; needs a real pixelization pass to be authentic.
artists.style: True low-resolution pixel art, early-1990s VGA point-and-click adventure background (256 colour, visible square pixels, hand-dithered gradients, limited muted indexed palette). Soft even light with a subtle warm lantern glow; low contrast, understated backdrop that does not draw the eye, accompaniment to story text. No people, no text or UI overlays. Portrait, taller than wide, 3:4.
